texto: To be ambitious for wealth and yet always expecting to be poor to be always doubting your ability to get what you long for is like trying to reach east by traveling west. ... No matter how hard you work for success if your thought is saturated with the fear of failure it will kill your efforts neutralize your endeavors and make success impossible.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Charles Baudouin: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “To be ambitious for wealth and yet always expecting to be poor to be always doubting your ability…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, anxiety, about pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e termino.
